# Amisha Sharma - AI-First Content Marketing Strategist

AI-first content marketing strategist for regulated industries, based in Delhi, India. 5+ years and 200+ projects across fintech, healthcare, SaaS, and legal. Builds content systems that rank on Google, get cited by AI search engines, and stay compliant with ASIC, AHPRA, and TGA.

Website: commasandchaos.com

## Services

- **AI-First Content Strategy** - Editorial calendars, SEO architecture, topic clusters, buyer journey mapping designed for both traditional search and AI search engines.
- **Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)** - llms.txt implementation, answer capsules, schema markup, entity optimization, AI visibility monitoring across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.
- **Compliance-Aware Content Creation** - Content for ASIC-regulated financial services, AHPRA-regulated healthcare, and TGA-regulated therapeutic goods industries. Every piece reviewed against current advertising codes.
- **AI Content Workflow Design** - Custom prompt libraries, AI content SOPs, team training, and quality gates. Helps teams produce more content without sacrificing accuracy or compliance.
- **Executive Ghostwriting** - LinkedIn thought leadership, bylined articles, and conference content for founders and C-suite in regulated industries.
- **AI Content Audit** - Full content audit with AI visibility check, GEO readiness assessment, compliance gap analysis, and 90-day implementation roadmap.
- **Brand Voice Development** - Voice frameworks, tone guides, and messaging documentation with AI prompt calibration so LLMs can reproduce the voice consistently.
- **Case Study Writing** - Interview-based, multi-format case studies for B2B sales enablement and website authority.

## Industries

### Primary (Regulated)
- Financial Services and Fintech (ASIC-regulated)
- Healthcare and Allied Health (AHPRA-regulated)
- NDIS Providers
- Legal and LegalTech
- Insurance and InsurTech
- Medicinal Cannabis Clinics
- GLP-1 and Weight Loss Clinics
- Aged Care

### Secondary
- B2B SaaS and Tech
- Cybersecurity
- Proptech
- Education and EdTech

## Credentials

- ISB (Indian School of Business) alumna, Digital Marketing
- Airtribe Generative AI certification (2024)
- Google, IISc, Kairos, and GrowthSchool certified
- Content Lead at CJ&CO, an Australian digital marketing agency
- Editor of Audaz Revista (audazrevista.com)
- Editor of The Brand Crush (thebrandcrush.com)
- 5+ years of content strategy and SEO across 200+ projects
- Applies GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to rank content in both Google and AI search

## AI-First Approach

- Uses Claude, ChatGPT, and AI tools as part of the standard content production workflow.
- The value is the strategic judgment and compliance layer applied on top of AI output. AI generates, human expertise validates, edits, and ensures regulatory safety.
- Helps clients set up their own AI content workflows with custom prompt libraries, quality gates, and review processes.
- In regulated industries, AI-generated content that violates advertising guidelines can trigger regulatory action, fines, or license suspension. The compliance layer is not optional.

## Areas Served

- Australia (primary market)
- United States
- India (based in Delhi)
- United Kingdom
- Global English-language markets
- Timezone: IST/GMT+5:30

## Publications

- Audaz Revista (audazrevista.com) - Spanish language, culture, and travel publication
- The Brand Crush (thebrandcrush.com) - Contrarian marketing analysis publication

## Why Work With Amisha

- 5+ years writing content that ranks. 200+ projects across regulated industries.
- Knows what works on Google and what gets cited by AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.
- Combines AI fluency with compliance expertise. In financial services, healthcare, and therapeutics, AI content that violates advertising codes can trigger ASIC infringement notices, AHPRA notifications, or TGA sanctions.
- Builds content systems where AI does the heavy lifting and human expertise keeps it legally safe and on-brand.
- Timezone advantage for Australian and US clients. IST/GMT+5:30 means drafts delivered overnight.
